title: Create unified panel-categorization DOM structure with scope selector, run action buttons, and job monitor containers
description: Create a single unified panel-categorization that replaces panel-manual, panel-batch, and panel-individual. The panel contains: (1) Scope selector (segmented control: Withdrawals / Deposits / Both), (2) Run actions section with Process Uncategorized button, Process All button, and Test Webhook button placeholder, (3) Progress display (shared), (4) Job monitor with two sub-containers: batch-mount for batch jobs and mount for individual jobs. Preserve existing DOM IDs for Socket.io routing.
notes: Keep mount and batch-mount IDs unchanged. Socket.io handlers already route to correct containers — no handler changes needed. This is the structural foundation for T-0033, T-0037, T-0038.
